hooks.description: Post commit notification to Discord and update linked Jira ticket

hooks.command: source scripts/jira_discord_bridge/hooks.sh && hook_on_pr_created "$(gh pr view --json title -q .title 2>/dev/null)" "$(gh pr view --json url -q .url 2>/dev/null)" "$(git branch --show-current)"
hooks.description: Post PR creation notification to Discord technical channel
Post EF Core migration notification to Discord when database schema is updated
